main.description: Record containing a private Stratos post with domain boundary restrictions. When stored on user's PDS as a stub, only 'source' and 'createdAt' are present. Full content is available from the hydration service.

source.description: When present, indicates this is a stub record. Full content should be hydrated from the referenced service.

text.description: The primary post content. May be an empty string, if there are embeds. Omitted in stub records.

boundary.description: Limit exposure to defined domains. Omitted in stub records.

facets.description: Annotations of text (mentions, URLs, hashtags, etc)

langs.description: Indicates human language of post primary text content.

labels.description: Self-label values for this post. Effectively content warnings.

tags.description: Additional hashtags, in addition to any included in post text and facets.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this post was originally created.

replyRef.description: Reference to parent and root posts for replies. Must reference stratos posts only.
